texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHILD POLICY
texts.text: CHILD POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Children 4years and below sharing a room is FOC.
texts.text: Children 4years and below sharing a room is FOC.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2.   Children 5years to 12years sharing a room pays 50% adult rate.
texts.text: Children 5years to 12years sharing a room pays 50% adult rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3.   Children 13years and above pays the same rate as adults.
texts.text: Children 13years and above pays the same rate as adults.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4.   Children in own room pays 75% room rate.
texts.text: Children in own room pays 75% room rate.

texts.text: Accommodation. meals on full board (lunch, dinner & breakfast), One sundowner, Wifi, All taxes

texts.orig: EXCLUDED
texts.text: EXCLUDED

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Masai Mara National Reserve fees (USD 100 per adult per day for nonresidents January-June, USD 200 per person per day July - December.
texts.text: Masai Mara National Reserve fees (USD 100 per adult per day for nonresidents January-June, USD 200 per person per day July - December.

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Additional activities (Balloon safaris - price on request - and village visits USD 20 per adult, USD 10 per child payable directly at the village in cash).

texts.label: list_item

texts.text: Tips, gratuities, items of personal nature

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Late departure (after 2 pm): pays extra lunch if required. Changing and toilet facilities available.
texts.text: Late departure (after 2 pm): pays extra lunch if required. Changing and toilet facilities available.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Additional meals: packed lunch USD 40 per person, extra lunch USD 50 per person
texts.text: Additional meals: packed lunch USD 40 per person, extra lunch USD 50 per person

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: GENERAL TERMS & CONDITIONS
texts.text: GENERAL TERMS & CONDITIONS

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All rates quoted are on a per room basis unless otherwise stated, and are inclusive of the relevant taxes and levies.
texts.text: All rates quoted are on a per room basis unless otherwise stated, and are inclusive of the relevant taxes and levies.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · These rates are subject to change without prior notice except for the confirmed bookings.
texts.text: These rates are subject to change without prior notice except for the confirmed bookings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit equivalent to the first night's rate will be required to secure your booking.
texts.text: A NON-REFUNDABLE deposit equivalent to the first night's rate will be required to secure your booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Where rates are affected by changes in Government taxes, we reserve the right to pass on such increases.
texts.text: Where rates are affected by changes in Government taxes, we reserve the right to pass on such increases.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No credit can be given for meals not taken for pre-booked accommodation plans which include meals.
texts.text: No credit can be given for meals not taken for pre-booked accommodation plans which include meals.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared in advance prior to arrival.
texts.text: We regret that we cannot accept personal cheques unless cleared in advance prior to arrival.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: BOOKING TERMS
texts.text: BOOKING TERMS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All provisional bookings are given an automatic expiry date (normally 2 weeks from booking date). You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date to avoid automatic release of the booking. If you require more time to confirm the booking, the expiry date may be extended on request. Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 50% deposit of the total reservation cost. The balance is payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.
texts.text: All provisional bookings are given an automatic expiry date (normally 2 weeks from booking date). You are required to confirm the booking prior to the expiry date to avoid automatic release of the booking. If you require more time to confirm the booking, the expiry date may be extended on request. Bookings are confirmed upon receipt of a 50% deposit of the total reservation cost. The balance is payable in full 45 days prior to arrival.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION POLICY
texts.text: CANCELLATION POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: A. Cancellation between 60-31 days prior to arrivals date: will incur 15% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 60-31 days prior to arrivals date: will incur 15% of the quotation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: B. Cancellation between 30-16 days prior to arrival date: will incur 30% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 30-16 days prior to arrival date: will incur 30% of the quotation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: C. Cancellation between 15-1 day (including NO-SHOW) prior to arrival date: will incur 100% of the quotation.
texts.text: Cancellation between 15-1 day (including NO-SHOW) prior to arrival date: will incur 100% of the quotation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT TERMS: BOOKINGS CAN ONLY BE CONFIRMED UPON FULL PAYMENT PRIOR TO ARRIVAL
texts.text: PAYMENT TERMS: BOOKINGS CAN ONLY BE CONFIRMED UPON FULL PAYMENT PRIOR TO ARRIVAL

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the tour operator shall immediately replace the same with cash and additionally agree to pay any bank charges for the Returned Cheque Fee. Failure to the Tour operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Kipekee Zuri Camp Mara thereafter reserves the right to nullify this contract.
texts.text: In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as 'unpaid' for any reason, the tour operator shall immediately replace the same with cash and additionally agree to pay any bank charges for the Returned Cheque Fee. Failure to the Tour operator to replace the 'unpaid' cheque within 48 hours will constitute a breach/default of contract and Kipekee Zuri Camp Mara thereafter reserves the right to nullify this contract.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Insurance
texts.text: Insurance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is a condition of using the rates and services offered by the Company that all clients (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) take out appropriate travel, medical and other insurance prior to departure of clients from their country of origin.
texts.text: It is a condition of using the rates and services offered by the Company that all clients (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) take out appropriate travel, medical and other insurance prior to departure of clients from their country of origin.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A visit to our property and particularly a safari entails an element of risk and neither the Company nor its officers and employees shall  be  liable  in  any  way  for  any  loss  or  damages  expense  or  cost  arising  from  any  incident  involving  clients  (individuals, companies and other legal entities), including anything Covid-19 related, that may occur whilst using any of the services provided by the Company or third parties contracted by this company.
texts.text: A visit to our property and particularly a safari entails an element of risk and neither the Company nor its officers and employees shall  be  liable  in  any  way  for  any  loss  or  damages  expense  or  cost  arising  from  any  incident  involving  clients  (individuals, companies and other legal entities), including anything Covid-19 related, that may occur whilst using any of the services provided by the Company or third parties contracted by this company.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Guests should be aware that Kipekee Zuri Camp Mara Ltd will require guests to sign indemnity forms. If guests are not willing to sign these forms, they will not be able to take part in certain activities, such as guided nature walks in the Siana Conservancy.
texts.text: Guests should be aware that Kipekee Zuri Camp Mara Ltd will require guests to sign indemnity forms. If guests are not willing to sign these forms, they will not be able to take part in certain activities, such as guided nature walks in the Siana Conservancy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is the responsibility of every client (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) to assess their own insurance requirements and to organize appropriate insurance.
texts.text: It is the responsibility of every client (including individuals, companies, and other legal entities) to assess their own insurance requirements and to organize appropriate insurance.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of failure of any client (individual, company, or other legal entity) to comply with these insurance conditions and requirements or to organize appropriate insurance then neither the Company nor its officers or employees nor any third party contracted by this company shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expenses or costs arising from any incident. Kipekee Zuri Camp Mara Ltd reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
texts.text: In the event of failure of any client (individual, company, or other legal entity) to comply with these insurance conditions and requirements or to organize appropriate insurance then neither the Company nor its officers or employees nor any third party contracted by this company shall be liable in any way for any loss or damages expenses or costs arising from any incident. Kipekee Zuri Camp Mara Ltd reserves the right to review published rates in the event of currency fluctuations or increases in taxes/levies/charges and costs that are beyond our control.
